title: IDFC First Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: IDFC First Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IDFC First Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IDFC First Bank:
IDFC First Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank!
